basics.name: Marcelo Der Torossian Torres
basics.label: Research Assistant Professor · Peptides, Antibiotics & AI
basics.summary: Research Assistant Professor at the University of Pennsylvania (Machine Biology Group). Peptide chemistry, structure-activity-guided antimicrobial peptide design, AI/deep-learning antibiotic discovery, peptide chemical modification, and low-cost biosensors.

location.address: Edward J. Stemmler Hall, 3450 Hamilton Walk

work.name: University of Pennsylvania
work.summary: Departments of Bioengineering and Psychiatry, Perelman School of Medicine.

work.name: University of Pennsylvania
work.summary: Machine Biology Group — AI-driven peptide discovery, nanomaterials, biosensors.

work.name: University of Pennsylvania
work.summary: Machine Biology Group — computational and experimental antibiotic discovery.

education.note: Thesis: Biological Applications of New Antimicrobial Peptides
Dissertation: Antimalarial Cyclic Derivatives of Angiotensin II
